name: golang-glog-dev
title: golang-glog-dev
description:
Leveled execution logs for Go
This is an efficient pure Go implementation of leveled logs in the manner of
the open source C++ package https://github.com/google/glog
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-glog-dev because Leveled execution logs for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-glog-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-glog-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-glog-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
